metadata.description: Agent skills for NeuroAPI — Neurobro's public API for financial market research

plugins.name: neurobro-market-research
plugins.description: Run financial market research through the NeuroAPI agent — equity and crypto analysis, technical setups, fundamental research, macro outlooks, and multi-asset investigations via POST /agent/ask

plugins.name: neurobro-meme-hunting
plugins.description: Discover and risk-vet trending and newly launched memecoins through the NeuroAPI agent — scan trending DEX pools, filter by liquidity and age, and audit tokens for honeypots, rug-pull risk, and holder concentration

plugins.name: neurobro-trading-setup
plugins.description: Build structured trade setups through the NeuroAPI agent — entry zones, stop-loss, take-profit targets, and risk/reward ratios grounded in technical analysis and derivatives positioning
